title: Veronica wyomingensis
taxonomy: Veronica wyomingensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the western United States. This plant is part of the genus Veronica, which includes species commonly known as speedwells. The genus Veronica belongs to the order Lamiales. The family Plantaginaceae is a group of flowering plants that also includes the waterworts and the plantains.
